mapper.sql: SELECT DISTINCT subject_id, tenant_id, building_id FROM t_voting_mobilization_permission WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND can_remind = TRUE AND deactivated_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select:
WITH scope AS (
), owner_scope AS ( SELECT s.subject_id, op.opid FROM scope s JOIN c_owner_property op ON op.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND op.building_id = s.building_id AND op.account_status = 1 ), vote_state AS ( SELECT os.subject_id, COUNT(DISTINCT os.opid) AS total_count, COUNT(DISTINCT os.opid) FILTER (WHERE vi.vote_id IS NULL) AS pending_count FROM owner_scope os LEFT JOIN t_vote_item vi ON vi.subject_id = os.subject_id AND vi.opid = os.opid GROUP BY os.subject_id ) SELECT vs.subject_id, subj.title AS subject_title, subj.subject_type AS subject_type, subj.vote_end_at AS vote_end_at, vs.total_count, vs.pending_count FROM vote_state vs JOIN t_voting_subject subj ON subj.subject_id = vs.subject_id WHERE subj.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND subj.status = 3 ORDER BY subj.vote_end_at ASC, subj.subject_id ASC

WITH scope AS (
), pending AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (op.opid) op.uid, op.building_id, op.room_id, a.real_name AS real_name, a.phone AS phone FROM scope s JOIN t_voting_subject subj ON subj.subject_id = s.subject_id AND subj.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND subj.status = 3 JOIN c_owner_property op ON op.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND op.building_id = s.building_id AND op.account_status = 1 JOIN c_user cu ON cu.uid = op.uid JOIN t_account a ON a.account_id = cu.account_id LEFT JOIN t_vote_item vi ON vi.subject_id = s.subject_id AND vi.opid = op.opid WHERE s.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND vi.vote_id IS NULL ORDER BY op.opid ) SELECT p.uid, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.real_name, ''), CONCAT('业主#', p.uid)) AS nick_name, CASE WHEN p.phone IS NULL OR length(p.phone) < 7 THEN p.phone ELSE CONCAT(substr(p.phone, 1, 3), '****', substr(p.phone, length(p.phone) - 3, 4)) END AS phone_masked, p.building_id, p.room_id, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT n.channel, ',' ORDER BY n.channel) AS notified_channels, MAX(n.notified_at) AS notified_at, (ARRAY_AGG(n.note ORDER BY n.notified_at DESC NULLS LAST))[1] AS note FROM pending p LEFT JOIN t_voting_mobilization_owner_notice n ON n.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND n.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND n.uid = p.uid GROUP BY p.uid, p.real_name, p.phone, p.building_id, p.room_id ORDER BY p.building_id, p.room_id, p.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_voting_mobilization_owner_notice ( subject_id, tenant_id, uid, building_id, room_id, notified_by_user_id, channel, note, notified_at ) SELECT #{subjectId}, #{tenantId}, op.uid, op.building_id, op.room_id, #{userId}, #{channel}, #{note}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM t_voting_mobilization_permission p JOIN t_voting_subject subj ON subj.subject_id = p.subject_id AND subj.tenant_id = p.tenant_id AND subj.status = 3 JOIN c_owner_property op ON op.tenant_id = p.tenant_id AND op.building_id = p.building_id AND op.uid = #{uid} AND op.account_status = 1 LEFT JOIN t_vote_item vi ON vi.subject_id = p.subject_id AND vi.opid = op.opid WHERE p.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.can_remind = TRUE AND p.deactivated_at IS NULL AND (p.expires_at IS NULL OR p.expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND vi.vote_id IS NULL ORDER BY op.building_id, op.room_id LIMIT 1 ON CONFLICT (subject_id, uid, channel) DO UPDATE SET building_id = EXCLUDED.building_id, room_id = EXCLUDED.room_id, notified_by_user_id = EXCLUDED.notified_by_user_id, note = EXCLUDED.note, notified_at = EXCLUDED.notified_at
